headline: Couple's 'Cute Nicknames' Have Escalated To 'Your Majesty' And 'Supreme Leader'
summary: Their friends refuse to be seen with them in public.
fullBody: Megan and Dave Cutesy started with 'babe' and 'honey.' They now address each other as 'Exalted One' and 'The High Council.' 'It started as a joke,' Dave said, bowing slightly. 'Now it's protocol.' Their text conversations read like royal decrees. Dinner reservations are made under 'Lord and Lady of the Table.' Their friends have created a support group called 'Intervention for the Crowned Couple.' They declined to attend, citing 'prior royal obligations.'
